heading: Restricted certificate
label: 8898 Restricted certificate
text: The Secretary of the Navy may restrict a certificate issued under this chapter so that it stays only the taking of testimony of certain witnesses or the production of evidence on certain subjects. The proceedings not stayed may continue.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7728(10th sentence).46 U.S.C. 794(10th sentence), .July 3, 1944, ch. 399, § 458 Stat. 724The words “The Secretary of the Navy may restrict a certificate” are substituted for the words “Any certificate * * * by the Secretary of the Navy * * * may, in his discretion, be restricted.” The words “the production of” are inserted for clarity. The words “in which event” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7728 of this title
